content_body:
Known for its mountain towns sprinkled across the region, North Georgia is a treasure trove of scenic day trips and quick getaways from Atlanta, which is only 1.5 hours away. And while a single day in Blue Ridge offers adventure and opportunity, the truth is that a single day just doesn’t do it justice. With so much to experience both indoors and out, a weekend in Blue Ridge transforms a rushed visit into a worthwile refreshing getaway.


Above the Timberline

Spending a full weekend gives you time to catch your breath, reconnect, and enjoy the best of what North Georgia has to offer. Perfect for families, couples, and friends, this destination just 90 miles north of Atlanta is worth staying for. Here's a sample itinerary to show you what you're missing! 

Friday Arrival: Settle Into Your Luxury Cabin

After your scenic drive up I-575, your own luxury cabin is waiting to welcome you to the mountains. From cabins settled along the banks of the Toccoa River or lodges that boast panoramic mountain views, our Blue Ridge vacation rentals offer the perfect base to begin your weekend escape.


Aska Escape Lodge

As you settle in, enjoy a fire outside with a glass of wine and revel in the crisp and clean mountain air. Many of our guests arrive Friday afternoon to make the most of their first evening with relaxing in the hot tub, grilling out, or simply watching the sun set below the tree line.

  • Pro Tip: Book one of our riverfront cabin rentals and enjoy being lulled to a deep sleep by the sounds of the rushing water.

Saturday: Your Day of North Georgia Adventure

Saturday is the perfect opportunity to dive into all that Blue Ridge has to offer. Rather than spend the first half of the day driving to the mountains, experience a fresh start from your cabin rental. Start with a specialty coffee or tea from Mountain Mama's Coffee Lounge before heading to hike to one of the nearby waterfalls like Fall Branch Falls. These easy and family-friendly trails reward you with breathtaking views and plenty of photo-ops. 

If you're in the mood for something more relaxed and open-ended, head to downtown Blue Ridge. Spend the afternoon browsing the boutiques, sipping wine at Bear Claw Vineyards or Doghobble Cellars, and grabbing a bite at Rum Cake Lady or Twisted Tomato.

In search of a thrill? Plan an afternoon of zip lining, fly fishing on the Toccoa, or kayaking Lake Blue Ridge. Our luxury cabins are centrally located to Blue Ridge's best activities and make it easy for you to make the most of your time here.

Wrap up the day with dinner in town or a cozy night back at the cabin around the firepit. Make s'mores, stargaze, and share stories about your memorable day up here. 

Sunday: Slow Journey Back Home

Sunday mornings in Blue Ridge bring a whole new level of relaxing. Brew some coffee, curl up on the outdoor furniture, and watch the fog lift from the mountains. Our Blue Ridge luxury cabins are designed for unhurried mornings. 

Before heading out, stop by Mercier Orchards for fresh pies, seasonal fruit, or some apple cider. If you have time for one last stop, visit the Expedition: Bigfoot Museum for local lore and an unrivaled Sasquatch exhibit.

  • Bonus: Consider a late check-out or even adding Sunday night stay to skip traffic and squeeze in a little more rest.

Why a Weekend in Blue Ridge Beats a Day Trip Every Time


The Rivers Edge

While a day trip offers a taste of Blue Ridge, a weekend gives you the full experience. Don't spend the day trying to cram it all in. Instead, spend some time finding your favorite spots and being present in the moment, wherever it takes you.

Staying the weekend means:

  • Time spent enjoying the luxury amenities in a private Blue Ridge cabin rental
  • Freedom for both adventure and relaxation
  • Fewer crowds during early mornings and late evenings
  • More connection with your crew

Booking a full weekend opens the door to a deeper Blue Ridge experience and digging in to time spent with your loved ones. Rather than spending all day driving around, reserving a weekend allows you the time to thoughtfully gather the lay of the land and orient your trip accordingly. 

Plan Your Blue Ridge Weekend Getaway


Serendipity on Noontootla Creek

Don’t limit yourself to just one day. Book your stay with Cabin Rentals of Georgia and unlock the full experience of the North Georgia mountains. Choose from:

  • Luxury cabin rentals in Blue Ridge GA
  • Pet-friendly cabins for your four-legged friends
  • Riverfront and mountain views for any occasion

Be sure to check out our last-minute cabin availability and specials to make the most of your getaway. Call us at 706-432-2140!

When it comes to Blue Ridge, one day is never enough, but a weekend is perfect.
title: Why a Day Trip to Blue Ridge Just Isn't Enough
